title: Block Breakers (Pickaxe Block)
description: This vanilla friendly datapack adds the Block Breaker, a new redstone block!
body:
### This vanilla friendly 1.19+ datapack adds the Block Breaker, a new redstone block!

This datapack is a plug and play datapack, no resource pack required. Simply drop the datapack .zip file into your datapack folder in your world and you will be all set.

### Block Breaker Recipe

![Block Breaker Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/Mpju2UqG/images/18179404cffdc66b6f2c2d70a0a21b43abef6f79.png)

### How to use

The block functions much like a dispenser or dropper. It will activate when powered by redstone, breaking any legal block in front of it. Anything you cannot break in survival it will not break. It also functions like a dispenser too, so you can dispense items and break blocks at the same time.
